description: Create per-tile state grids in :core for the 5 world physics systems (Snow, Footprints, Wind, Blood). These are pure Kotlin data structures with simulation logic (accumulation, decay, direction). LightSource already exists in :game so torch light needs no :core grid. All grids are renderer-agnostic and fully unit-tested.
steps: Create WindState.kt: data class with direction (angle in radians), strength (0.0-1.0), and gustiness. Provides dx/dy components derived from angle+strength. Include update(dt) that slowly drifts direction with Perlin-like smoothness (deterministic seed-based for testing).

Create SnowGrid.kt: 2D per-tile grid (width x height). Each cell has snowDepth (0.0-1.0). accumulate(dt, wind) adds snow uniformly with wind-drift bias. melt(dt, rate) reduces depth. Method stampFootprint(x, y) sets depth to 0. Method refill(dt, rate) gradually restores stamped cells toward surrounding average. Grid is initialized with configurable dimensions.

Create BloodGrid.kt: 2D per-tile grid. Each cell has bloodLevel (0.0-1.0). Method splatter(x, y, intensity, radius) sets cells within radius to intensity (clamped). Method fade(dt, rate) reduces all cells over time. Method clear() resets all.

Create WeatherState.kt: orchestrator that holds WindState + SnowGrid + BloodGrid together. Method tick(dt) advances all sub-systems. Configurable via WeatherConfig data class (snowRate, meltRate, bloodFadeRate, footprintRefillRate, windDriftSpeed).

Create unit tests in core/src/commonTest/kotlin/rpg/weather/SnowGridTest.kt: test accumulation increases depth, melting decreases depth, stampFootprint zeroes cell, refill restores stamped cells, depth clamped to 0.0-1.0.
Create unit tests in core/src/commonTest/kotlin/rpg/weather/BloodGridTest.kt: test splatter sets cells, radius works correctly, fade reduces over time, clear resets all, intensity clamped.
Create unit tests in core/src/commonTest/kotlin/rpg/weather/WindStateTest.kt: test dx/dy correspond to angle, strength=0 gives zero vector, update drifts direction.
Create unit tests in core/src/commonTest/kotlin/rpg/weather/WeatherStateTest.kt: test tick advances all subsystems, config parameters respected.
acceptance_criteria: SnowGrid accumulation/melt/stamp/refill logic works correctly (6+ test cases pass)
BloodGrid splatter/fade/clear logic works correctly (5+ test cases pass)
WindState direction/strength/update logic works correctly (3+ test cases pass)
WeatherState tick orchestrates all sub-grids (2+ test cases pass)
No KorGE or Compose dependencies in any :core file
verification: ./gradlew :core:desktopTest (all tests pass including new weather/ tests)
findings: All 9 source+test files created. ./gradlew :core:desktopTest passes (all 37+ tests green including 4 new weather test classes). ./gradlew :game:compileKotlinDesktop passes. No issues encountered. WindState uses data class with private var for elapsed time tracking. SnowGrid.accumulate takes rate as separate parameter (not from wind) for flexibility.
